title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class AI model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, and scientific research. The company implemented safety systems to limit its use in high-risk domains like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It matters because Anthropic paired the release with safety systems that restrict access to the model's full capabilities in high-risk domains. The concrete takeaways: the restricted domains include cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry, and the capability set includes object detection alongside broader analytics and research functions.
